**Token Request Details**

**Email:** your@email.com
**Tier:** Free/Pro/Premium

**Educational Use Confirmation**

- [ ] I understand misuse may result in token revocation
- [ ] I have read the extension usage guidelines

**Additional Information**
Any additional context about your request.
